Why Billman's

Why homeowners on the Coast choose us over the rest

Plenty of builders can quote a job. Here's what actually changes once we're the ones holding the nail gun.

01

Local to the Coast

Based in Yeppoon and working right across Rockhampton and the Capricorn Coast — we know the soil, the salt air, and what actually holds up here.

02

One crew, start to finish

The person who quotes your job is the person who builds it. No handing you off to a rotating cast of subbies you've never met.

03

Built to actually last

Proper hardwood decking, correctly sealed joins and fixings chosen for coastal weather — not the cheapest option that fails in year two.

04

Straight, free quotes

You'll get a clear, honest number before we start — no vague allowances, no surprise invoice waiting at the end of the job.

What We Build

From a single deck to a full home build

Whatever stage your project's at, it's one call.

Decks

Timber decking built for entertaining, pool surrounds and everyday coastal living.

Pergolas & Patios

Shaded outdoor living areas designed to suit your home and how you actually use the yard.

Handrails & Balustrades

Safe, council-compliant rails and balustrades that match the rest of the build.

Deck Maintenance

Repairs, re-oiling and board replacement to bring a tired deck back to life.

Renovations

Interior fit-outs, flooring, staircases and full room transformations.

Full Home Builds & Sheds

From backyard sheds to complete home builds, managed from the ground up.

Where We Work

Proudly building across the Capricorn Coast

Based in Yeppoon, our crew covers the whole region — if you're near the coast, chances are we've already built something down your street.

  • Yeppoon
  • Rockhampton
  • Emu Park
  • Zilzie
  • Cooee Bay
  • Capricorn Coast
Outside the list? Give us a call — if it's within reach of the Coast, we probably still cover it.
